---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

::: {.section-page}

# Research

This section presents broader research themes and the scientific context tying the work together.

<div class="project-list">

<div class="project-item">
<a class="project-link" href="research/pacwave-nonlinear-wave-propagation.qmd">
<div class="project-number">1.1</div>
<div class="project-text">
<div class="project-title">Nonlinear Wave Propagation and Structural Response Analysis for PacWave South</div>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="project-tag">time series analysis</span>
<span class="project-tag">dynamics simulation</span>
<span class="project-tag">wave energy</span>
<span class="project-tag">nonlinear modeling</span>
<span class="project-tag">ocean engineering</span>
<span class="project-tag">statistical characterization</span>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="project-divider"></div>

<div class="project-item">
<a class="project-link" href="research/pacwave-mooring-load-prediction.qmd">
<div class="project-number">1.2</div>
<div class="project-text">
<div class="project-title">Mooring Line Load Prediction and Anchor Sensitivity for PacWave South</div>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="project-tag">mooring dynamics</span>
<span class="project-tag">extreme value analysis</span>
<span class="project-tag">fatigue screening</span>
<span class="project-tag">numerical simulation</span>
<span class="project-tag">ocean engineering</span>
<span class="project-tag">model validation</span>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="project-divider"></div>

</div>

:::
